Three red tomatoes are on the left side of the table and two blue bowls are on the right side. Make every required object visible in every frame. No extra objects. Keep counts, colors, side placement, and visibility stable.

consistency_rules: exactly one person visible in every frame
no other people or staff in the background or periphery
layout_constraints: three red tomatoes on the left side of the table
two blue bowls on the right side of the table
rewrite_plan.main_subject: exactly one chef wearing a white jacket
motion_constraints: gentle steam rising from the small pot
